title: pepito-911/research

title: hesamaria/rag-chatbot

title: inbharatai/OpenClaw-AI-CMO

title: brianmeyer/distillreasoning
summary: Teaching a 4B model to think by borrowing reasoning from models 200x its size.

title: niklasmarderx/Ember
summary: Blazing-fast AI agent framework written in Rust. Simple, fast, and extensible.

title: YASOLG/ml-bootcamp
summary: ⚡ Master machine learning in 10 days with this interactive, open-source bootcamp. Learn Python basics to production ML at no cost.

title: dovvnloading/Graphlink
summary: Graphlink (formerly Graphite) is a local-first, graph-based AI workspace for building branching reasoning workflows, running agent plugins, and orchestrating multiple AI providers in a visual environment designed for complex problem solving.

title: Been012/df-storyteller
summary: A companion journal and legends browser for Dwarf Fortress. Track your fortress, explore world history, map your world, and document the stories that emerge from your gameplay.

title: SamueleSalerno4/agentic-rag-for-dummies
summary: 🚀 Build a production-ready Agentic RAG system with LangGraph using minimal code and streamline your AI development process.

title: LocalKinAI/kin-code
summary: AI coding assistant in Go. 9MB single binary, zero dependencies. MCP support, Soul files for custom AI personas. 10 built-in tools + sub-agents + web search + memory. The only Claude Code alternative with both MCP and Soul files.

title: Alex8791-cyber/cognithor
summary: Cognithor - Agent OS: Local-first autonomous agent operating system. 16 LLM providers, 17 channels, 112+ MCP tools, 5-tier memory, A2A protocol, knowledge vault, voice, browser automation, Computer-use, self-healing, self-improving. Python 3.12+, Apache 2.0.

title: YanCheng-go/my-focal-ai
summary: Personal news intelligence — aggregate AI content from curated sources, score with LLM, serve your own dashboard

title: zabarich/danucode
summary: The simplest agent shell for your own models. Backend-agnostic terminal coding agent for Ollama, llama.cpp, vLLM, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. (c) Danucore

title: TinoFerrucci/Datagentra
summary: Autonomous data analyst: ask questions in plain English, get SQL, charts, and insights. Powered by OpenAI or Ollama (local). Built with FastAPI + React + SQLite.

title: ScottishSaint/ollama-api-pool
summary: 🚀 Simplify API management with Ollama API Pool, a robust solution for seamless integration and optimized performance in your projects.

title: reallyreallyryan/hearth
summary: Hearth is a local-first persistent AI memory system. Install it once, and every AI tool you use — Claude Desktop, LM Studio, Cursor — can store and recall memories across conversations. Your data stays on your machine in a single SQLite file.

title: soyalexisortiz/TDYCODER
summary: 🤖 Enhance coding with TDYCODER, an AI-powered editor offering local LLM models for private, offline support and advanced features in a sleek environment.
